commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an internal source delivery contract and migrates isolated cron execution/tests to derive source reply mode, message-tool policy, target forwarding, and fallback skipping from that contract.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is an internal refactor rather than a bug report. The relevant behavior is checked by source inspection and focused contract/cron tests in the PR.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor real-behavior proof or maintainer override, not a narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to automate.

target.title: refactor(cron): centralize source delivery contract
target.body:
## Summary
- Add an internal source delivery contract that captures visible-delivery ownership, message-tool policy, and direct fallback behavior.
- Migrate isolated cron announce delivery to derive `sourceReplyDeliveryMode`, message-tool policy, target forwarding, and fallback skipping from that contract.
- Add contract unit coverage plus focused cron message-tool policy coverage.

## Verification
Behavior addressed: Internal refactor only; cron announce delivery keeps the landed message-tool-only behavior while centralizing delivery ownership in one contract.
Real environment tested: Local source checkout on macOS with focused source/type/lint/test gates.
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm format:check src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-contract.ts src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-contract.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-contract.ts src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-contract.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/clawdbot4-source-delivery-contract.tsbuildinfo --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-contract.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.message-tool-policy.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --output /tmp/clawdbot4-source-delivery-contract-autoreview.txt`
Evidence after fix: Contract tests cover message-tool-owned vs direct-fallback projection; cron regression coverage still asserts `sourceReplyDeliveryMode: "message_tool_only"`, forced message tool, target forwarding, and fallback skip behavior.
Observed result after fix: Format, lint, tsgo, focused Vitest, and autoreview are clean; focused Vitest reported 2 files and 32 tests passed.
What was not tested: No live Discord/cron run; no public API, config, or protocol surface changed.
target.author: steipete
